CustomField.description: remaining working days M-F left on the project.
CustomField.formula: IF( Project_End_Date__c <= TODAY(), 0, ( ( CASE( WEEKDAY(Project_End_Date__c), 1, Project_End_Date__c - 2, 7, Project_End_Date__c - 1, Project_End_Date__c ) - TODAY() + 1 ) - ( 2 * FLOOR( ( CASE( WEEKDAY(Project_End_Date__c), 1, Project_End_Date__c - 2, 7, Project_End_Date__c - 1, Project_End_Date__c ) - TODAY() + WEEKDAY(TODAY()) ) / 7 ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Remaining Working Days
